cells.rationale: Subtle durability correctness invariant (returned-set===deleted-set gating artifact GC, immune wake-queue rows never pruned) on a contract-and-index-touching retention scan where a wrong abstraction silently corrupts GC — a hard opus gate at the contract-shaped xhigh band.

Bounded, well-specified presence-reap arm plus verification-only coverage across three files, but needs delicate in-repo idiom matching (pure-seam decision tests, FakeChild harness) and care on the never-reap-live-socket invariant — judgment-heavy workhorse work at the multi-file default band, not opus-gated.
